scripts.cv:html: mkdir -p cv-src/out && pandoc -f markdown+fenced_divs+bracketed_spans cv-src/andre-carvalho-pt.md -o cv-src/out/andre-carvalho-desenvolvedor.html --standalone --embed-resources --resource-path=cv-src --css cv.css && pandoc -f markdown+fenced_divs+bracketed_spans cv-src/andre-carvalho-en.md -o cv-src/out/andre-carvalho-developer.html --standalone --embed-resources --resource-path=cv-src --css cv.css
scripts.cv:pdf: npm run cv:html && mkdir -p public/cv && weasyprint cv-src/out/andre-carvalho-desenvolvedor.html public/cv/andre-carvalho-desenvolvedor.pdf && weasyprint cv-src/out/andre-carvalho-developer.html public/cv/andre-carvalho-developer.pdf
